https://hk.usconsulate.gov/zhhk/visas-zh/visa-report-fraud-zh/
入面有得upload相同文件

領事部歡迎你舉報有關不法使用美國護照, 不法使用簽證, 不誠實的申請, 及任何其他與護照或簽證有關的不法行為。

你可以透過填寫以下表格舉報欺詐。請提供僅與欺詐有關的資料, 包括犯罪者的完整名字, 出生日期和他/她的不法行為。如需附上相關的電子文件(例如手機拍攝的簽證相片,身份證, 護照頁等) 請點擊表格下方的按鈕傳送本部。你亦可以將上述資電郵致 FPUHK@state.gov。

replies.msg:
投訴師出動 自己加埋樓主啲key words 啦


undergrad-admissions@duke.edu

Complaint of the Admission of TONG Tak On, Harris

Dear Sir/ Madam,

I am writing to complain your university’s admission of TONG Tak On (Harris TONG) who publicly supports the implementation of the National Security Law in Hong Kong. The National Security Law is an unjust law which allows the China Central People's Government to establish a national security agency in Hong Kong and interrupt Hong Kong’s political affairs on the pretext of national security. It gives Beijing powers to shape life in Hong Kong it has never had before and deprives Hong Kong people of their freedom and human rights. I am regret to read Mr. Harris TONG’s speech about supporting the evil law on the newspaper today. It is sincerely hoped that you can consider again about the admission of student TONG Tak On, Harris, whose father is the committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference. This may secretly involve spying activities and pose a far-reaching harm to the safety of the US. It is my deepest concern that accepting a student who supports the suppression of basic human rights will possibly damage the reputation of your school.

The reference is attached below. Thank you.

Yours faithfully,
XXX

要投訴去領事館取消佢visa先阻到佢

replies.msg:
美領版

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to express my concern about the integrity of Tong Tak On from Diocesan Boys’ School, which will soon start his tertiary education in the States.

According to a recent article featuring students with outstanding performance in the International Baccalaureate by Stand News (A Hong Kong-based news platform), Mr. Tong Tak On, a student from Diocesan Boys' School,HK who scores a total of 44 marks and be accepted by the Duke University claimed that THE NATIONAL SECURITY LAW WILL IMPROVE THE SOCIAL ENVIRONMENT OF HONG KONG. The National Security Law, is an unjust law that deprives Hong Kongers of their basic rights and freedoms which has been condemned by the head of different states.

Tong, the son of a committee member of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference also claimed that THE RULE BY LAW HAS PRECEDENCE OVER FREEDOM, and ON THE BASIS OF THE “ONE COUNTRY TWO SYSTEM” PRINCIPLE , PROSPERITY AND STABILITY WILL ONLY BE ESTABLISHED WHEN THE COUNTRY’S SECURITY IS GUARANTEED.

It is my deepest concern that approving the VISA application of a student who supports the suppression of basic human rights will possibly pose threat to your country. Meanwhile, I sincerely suspect that he may be involved in spying activity while studying in your school, as his father is one of the committees of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference. Therefore, it is hope that the VISA application of Mr Tong could be reconsidered seriously. And if the application has been approved already, I hope the VISA can be revoked promptly.

Enclosed please find the reference of his claim.

Thank you.

Yours faithfully,
XXX
所以戰線要有支那留學生先得 而加仲係一車車送去
